meta.title: PB Autocomplete — Loja teste (Woo + PagBank + CEP)
meta.description: WooCommerce, PagBank Connect e PB Autocomplete; opções Brasil/BRL, Connect sandbox e produto simples R$ 50.
meta.author: Ricardo Martins (PagBank Integrações)

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

update_option( 'blogname', 'Loja Teste Pb Autocomplete' );
update_option( 'time_format', 'H:i' );
/**
 * Ordem de carregamento: WooCommerce antes de PagBank e PB Autocomplete.
 * (A lista pedida com WooCommerce por último faria o PagBank quebrar ao carregar.)
 */
update_option( 'active_plugins', array(
	'woocommerce/woocommerce.php',
	'pagbank-connect/rm-pagbank.php',
	'pb-autocomplete/pb-autocomplete.php',
) );

update_option( 'woocommerce_allowed_countries', 'specific' );
update_option( 'woocommerce_all_except_countries', array() );
update_option( 'woocommerce_specific_allowed_countries', array( 'BR' ) );
update_option( 'woocommerce_ship_to_countries', 'specific' );
update_option( 'woocommerce_specific_ship_to_countries', array( 'BR' ) );
update_option( 'woocommerce_default_customer_address', 'base' );
update_option( 'woocommerce_currency', 'BRL' );
update_option( 'pb_autocomplete_settings', array(
	'postcode_first_billing' => true,
	'postcode_first_shipping' => true,
) );
update_option( 'WPLANG', 'pt_BR' );

$pagbank_settings_serialized = 'a:22:{s:11:"connect_key";s:40:"CONSANDBOX795E98520284853531616BF851FF2B";s:7:"general";s:0:"";s:19:"hide_if_unavailable";s:2:"no";s:23:"skip_processing_virtual";s:2:"no";s:12:"enable_proxy";s:2:"no";s:5:"title";s:11:"PagBank UOL";s:14:"shipping_param";s:0:"";s:18:"show_payment_icons";s:3:"yes";s:11:"icons_color";s:4:"gray";s:16:"success_behavior";s:0:"";s:20:"success_behavior_url";s:71:"https://playground.wordpress.net/scope:patient-chic-village/my-account/";s:19:"success_behavior_js";s:0:"";s:18:"force_order_update";s:2:"no";s:10:"hide_items";s:2:"no";s:17:"hash_email_active";s:2:"no";s:22:"split_payments_section";s:0:"";s:22:"split_payments_enabled";s:2:"no";s:33:"split_payments_primary_account_id";s:0:"";s:24:"split_payments_receivers";a:0:{}s:10:"public_key";s:392:"";s:21:"public_key_created_at";i:1577836800000;s:10:"is_sandbox";b:1;}';

update_option( 'woocommerce_rm-pagbank_settings', maybe_unserialize( $pagbank_settings_serialized ) );

if ( class_exists( 'WC_Product_Simple' ) ) {
	$product = new WC_Product_Simple();
	$product->set_name( 'Produto teste R$ 50' );
	$product->set_regular_price( '50' );
	$product->set_price( '50' );
	$product->set_status( 'publish' );
	$product->save();
}
